purpose: Original SD mobile-suit mascot source art for the SWANFRAME WonderSwan player
notes: The v4 SWANFRAME mascot was used only as an identity reference for a targeted tiny-screen readability pass. V5 simplifies the face, antenna, chest core, shoulders, and mixer lights. The approved source master remains amber/cyan; the deterministic runtime derivative applies the Night Drive UI colorway. Retired cat and insect assets were not used as inputs. Exact interface text is rendered by ROM code.
